ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the passenger (0 = male, 1 = female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "travel_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel class the passenger belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number (if applicable) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel route */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel class */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was booked */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., booked, canceled, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES travel_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Departure port */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Arrival port */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the route information was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., First Class, Second Class, Third Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the travel class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_travel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel history entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route traveled */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel class for the specific travel history */,
  "travel_status" TEXT /* Status of the travel (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_travel_history_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_travel_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES travel_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_travel_history_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, ticketing agent, customer support) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets_sold" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_sold_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route generating revenue */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date of revenue */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of revenue (e.g., ticket sales, onboard services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES travel_routes ("route_id")
)
